title: World Bridge
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B3BFjoDp/images/09ccfa2db323700bedf9eacc8b22b2f1def09074.png)

## Allows the easy transfer and storage of mobs, using Soul Crystals and the Soul Explorer block.

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B3BFjoDp/images/c84defdd16347698a9eb3d72b23ecffb4217fd76.gif)
----
### Recipe

![SoulExplorer Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B3BFjoDp/images/b7c42583d6d99cc86d3f48c5f28f03118373bff3.png)
#### Soul Explorer Block
----

Soul Crystals can be found in end cities.

----

Versions below v2.0.0 are incompatible with servers.

----
